positive: A detailed, minimalist illustration of a luminous forest scene at twilight. The composition must be centrally framed, featuring bioluminescent flora, stylized glowing mushrooms, and gracefully curved branches forming a natural, symmetrical border. Include subtle, ethereal elements like shooting stars, delicate celestial crescent moons, and constellations connecting the elements. Use a deep indigo and sapphire color palette, contrasted sharply with vibrant teal, luminous gold, and soft emerald green. The style should be high-contrast, clean vector art mixed with intricate line work, resembling a modern sticker or apparel patch design. Perfect silhouette quality, flat graphic design sensibility, high resolution, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, lettering, watermark, signature, logo, artifacts, blur, noisy, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, messy, hyperrealistic, photo, 3d render, grayscale
